questions.question: National Viral Hepatitis Control Program (NVHCP) aims to achieve country wide elimination of Hepatitis C by _____:
questions.explanation: The National Viral Hepatitis Control Program aims to combat hepatitis and achieve country wide elimination of Hepatitis C by 2030. Launched on 28 July, 2018, it also aims to achieve significant reduction in the infected population, morbidity and mortality associated with Hepatitis B and C viz. Cirrhosis and Hepato-cellular carcinoma (liver cancer).

questions.question: The Global Business Summit which was launched on 15th January, 2015 is a major initiative of which group?
questions.explanation: Launched on January 15, 2015, the Global Business Summit is a flagship initiative of the Times Group. The objective of the Global Business Summit 2019 was to highlight the myriad aspects of the world economy and define the factors that will propel the Indian economy to new heights through a carefully crafted plenary session. It was held in New Delhi.

questions.question: Who among the following will take up the role of Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of SBI General Insurance effective in October 2022?
questions.explanation: SBI General Insurance has announced the appointment of Kishore Kumar Poludasu as its new managing director & chief executive officer.

questions.question: Which of the following individuals has recently been appointed as Chairman & Managing Director (CMD) of Navratna Defence PSU Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL)?
questions.explanation: Mr. Dinesh Kumar Batra, who was formerly the Director (Finance) and Chief Financial Officer of Bharat Electronics Limited, has recently taken on the additional responsibilities of Chairman and Managing Director (CMD) of the Navratna Defense PSU (BEL).

questions.question: Which payments bank collaborated with the RBIH in October 2022 to innovate financial products and services?
questions.explanation: India Post Payments Bank (IPPB) & Reserve Bank Innovation Hub (RBIH) Collaborate for innovations in Financial Product & Services.

questions.question: Which of the following banks was placed 63rd on the Best Workplaces in Asia 2022 list, becoming the only bank in India to be featured by Great Place to Work?
questions.explanation: Federal Bank was ranked 63rd on the Best Workplaces in Asia 2022 and becomes the only bank in India to be listed by Great Place to Work, the global authority on workplace culture.

questions.question: Nowadays, Global rogue forces are using cutting-edge technologies such as UAVs, Smart Swarms etc. to infiltrate the Indian territory and recently Jammu Air Base was attacked by such technologies to drop explosives next to the Mi-17 hangar. To counter such attacks in future, Hyderabad-based technology R&D firm Grene Robotics has designed and developed India’s first indigenous drone defence dome called:
questions.explanation: Grene Robotics, based in Hyderabad, developed “Indrajaal,” India’s first indigenous drone defense dome, capable of autonomously protecting 1000-2000 sq km from aerial threats like UAVs and low-RCS targets. The Varunastra is a ship-launched, heavyweight, electrically-propelled anti-submarine torpedo effective against quiet submarines in various water depths, inducted by the Indian Navy in 2016. The DRDO designed “Maareech” to detect, locate, and neutralize incoming torpedoes. The Smart Anti-Airfield Weapon (SAAW), also developed by DRDO’s RCI in Hyderabad, is a 125 kg smart weapon that can target enemy airfield assets up to 100 km away.

questions.question: In 2018, Amnesty International stripped whom of the Ambassador of Conscience Award Given in 2009?
questions.explanation: London-based global human rights organization Amnesty International has stripped Myanmar leader Aung San Suu Kyi of its Ambassador of Conscience Award over the de facto Myanmar leader’s “indifference” to the atrocities committed by the country’s military against Rohingya Muslims.

questions.question: In 2018, who along with Bharat Vatwani became the two Indians awarded with the Ramon Magsaysay award?
questions.explanation: Two Indians Bharat Vatwani and Sonam Wang-chuk won the 2018 Ramon Magsaysay Award, announced in Manila in July 2018. Vatwani was awarded for leading the rescue of thousands of mentally ill street paupers to treat and reunite them with their families and Wangchuk for harnessing nature, culture and education for community progress.

questions.question: The Bharat 6G Vision Document lays out a roadmap to roll out 6G services across the country by:
questions.explanation: The Bharat 6G Vision Document lays out a roadmap to roll out 6G services across the country by 2030. 6G will be implemented in 2 phases (2023 – 2025 and 2025 – 2030). The document is prepared by the Technology Innovation Group on 6G (TIG-6G). TIG-6G was constituted in 2021 to develop a roadmap and action plans for 6G in India. The national mission for 6G will have a 9-year tenure (2022-2031), with funding in 3 tranches.
